name: decisionvault
description: DecisionVault is a MERN decision intelligence platform with CollegeVault as the flagship college selection module.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
scripts.seed:all: npm --prefix server run seed && npm --prefix server run seed:cutoffs
